title: 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM - 211info
text: 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone 211 Text Short Code 898211 Text the word health or salud Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or text for information. Voicemail option available if calling after hours or specialists are unavailable. FEES: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Abortion Expense Assistance Abortion Referrals Abortions Adolescent/Youth
